description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring a combination of light wood and dark panel exteriors. The structure is surrounded by a landscaped yard with palm trees, grassy areas, and a small swimming pool. The front of the building includes a driveway leading to a garage, while the rear and side yards offer outdoor seating and recreational spaces. Large glass windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor areas. The property is enclosed by a low fence, and the overall layout emphasizes open, functional living spaces. The architectural style is characterized by clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with wood and dark panel exteriors, large windows, landscaped yard, and a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, wood paneling, and the pool area with surrounding greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, outdoor seating, and large glass windows facing the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more trees, a fenced yard, and a clear look at the outdoor recreational area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
